member.name: T:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1
member.summary: Represents the context for adding a resilience pipeline with the specified key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.PipelineKey
member.summary: Gets the pipeline key for the pipeline being created.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Gets the that provides access to the dependency injection container.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.RegistryContext
member.summary: Gets the context that is used by the registry.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.EnableReloads``1(System.String)
member.summary: Enables dynamic reloading of the resilience pipeline whenever the options are changed.
member.typeparam: The options type to listen to.
member.param: The named options, if any.
member.remarks:
You can decide based on the to listen for changes in global options or named options. If is then the global options are listened to.
You can listen for changes from multiple options by calling this method with different types.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.GetOptions``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the options identified by .
member.typeparam: The options type.
member.param: The options name, if any.
member.remarks: If is then the global options are returned.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.OnPipelineDisposed(System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a callback that is called when the pipeline instance being configured is disposed.
member.param: The callback delegate.

member.name: T:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1
member.summary: Represents the context for configuring resilience pipelines with the specified key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Gets the that provides access to the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.AddResiliencePipeline(`0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder,Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{`0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to the registry.
member.param: The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.AddResiliencePipeline``1(`0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``0},Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{`0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to the registry.
member.typeparam: The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: T:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering resilience pipelines using the .

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``1}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline that handles to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``1},Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{``0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline that handles to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder,Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{``0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelines``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext{``0}})
member.summary: Allows deferred addition of one or more resilience pipelines to the service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipelines.
member.param: The to add resilience pipelines to.
An action that allows configuration of resilience pipelines.
member.returns: The updated with the addition configuration added.
member.remarks:
This method can be useful if you want to add resilience pipelines as late as possible, e.g. to allow other services / configuration to be available before providing the key.
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelineRegistry``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Polly.Registry.ResiliencePipelineRegistryOptions{``0}})
member.summary: Adds and to the service collection that allows configuring and retrieving resilience pipelines using the key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The action that configures the that are used by the registry.
member.returns: The updated with additional services added.
member.remarks: This call enables telemetry for all resilience pipelines created using .

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelineRegistry``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds and to the service collection that allows configuring and retrieving resilience pipelines using the key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
member.returns: The updated with additional services added.
member.remarks: This call enables telemetry for all resilience pipelines created using .

member.name: T:Polly.Registry.ConfigureBuilderContextExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for .

member.summary: Enables dynamic reloading of the resilience pipeline whenever the options are changed.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The options type to listen to.
member.param: The builder context.
The options monitor.
The named options, if any.
member.remarks:
You can decide based on the to listen for changes in global options or named options. If is then the global options are listened to.
You can listen for changes from multiple options by calling this method with different types.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2
member.summary: Enrichment context used when reporting resilience events.
member.typeparam: The type of the result.
The type of the arguments attached to the resilience event.
member.remarks: This context is passed to enrichers in . Always use the constructor when creating this struct, otherwise we do not guarantee binary compatibility.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.#ctor(Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryEventArguments{`0,`1}@,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The telemetry event info.
Tags associated with the resilience event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.TelemetryEvent
member.summary: Gets the info about the telemetry event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tags associated with the resilience event.
member.remarks: Custom enricher can add tags to this collection.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__ResilienceEventStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__PipelineExecutedStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__ExecutionAttemptStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.MeteringEnricher
member.summary: Enricher used to enrich the metrics with additional information.

member.summary: Enriches the metrics with additional information.
member.typeparam: The type of result.
The type of arguments.
member.param: The enrichment context.

member.summary: Arguments used by .

The resilience event.
The resilience context.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.SeverityProviderArguments.Context
member.summary: Gets the resilience context.

member.summary: Gets the tags associated with the resilience event.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions
member.summary: The options that are used to configure the telemetry that is produced by the resilience strategies.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.#ctor(Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The telemetry options instance to copy the data from.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.TelemetryListeners
member.summary: Gets the collection of telemetry listeners.
member.value: The default value is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.LoggerFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger factory.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.MeteringEnrichers
member.summary: Gets the collection of telemetry enrichers.
member.value: The default value is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.ResultFormatter
member.summary: Gets or sets the result formatter.
member.value: The default value is a formatter that returns a status code for HTTP based responses and the result as-is for all other result types. This property is required.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.SeverityProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the resilience event severity provider that allows customizing the severity of resilience events.

member.name: T:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions
member.summary: The telemetry extensions for the .

member.name: M:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelemetry``1(``0,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Enables telemetry for this builder.
member.typeparam: The builder type.
member.param: The builder instance.
The logger factory to be used for logging.
member.returns: The builder instance with the telemetry enabled.
member.remarks: By enabling telemetry, the resilience pipeline will log and meter all resilience events. Additionally, the telemetry strategy that logs and meters the executions is added to the beginning of the composite strategy.

member.name: M:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelemetry``1(``0,Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions)
member.summary: Enables telemetry for this builder.
member.typeparam: The builder type.
member.param: The builder instance.
The resilience telemetry options.
member.returns: The builder instance with the telemetry enabled.
member.remarks: By enabling telemetry, the resilience pipeline will log and meter all resilience events. Additionally, the telemetry strategy that logs and meters the executions is added to the beginning of the composite strategy.

member.name: T:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext
member.summary: The validation context that encapsulates parameters for the validation.

member.name: M:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.#ctor(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The instance being validated.
The primary validation message.

member.name: P:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.Instance
member.summary: Gets the instance being validated.

member.name: P:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.PrimaryMessage
member.summary: Gets the primary validation message.
member.remarks: The primary message is displayed first followed by the details about the validation errors.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute
member.summary: Tags parameter that should be filled with specific caller name.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Function parameter to take the name from.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets name of the function parameter that name should be taken from.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that certain members on a specified are accessed dynamically, for example through .
member.remarks:
This allows tools to understand which members are being accessed during the execution of a program.
This attribute is valid on members whose type is or .
When this attribute is applied to a location of type , the assumption is that the string represents a fully qualified type name.
When this attribute is applied to a class, interface, or struct, the members specified can be accessed dynamically on instances returned from calling on instances of that class, interface, or struct.
If the attribute is applied to a method it's treated as a special case and it implies the attribute should be applied to the "this" parameter of the method. As such the attribute should only be used on instance methods of types assignable to System.Type (or string, but no methods will use it there).

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified member types.
member.param: The types of members dynamically accessed.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute.MemberTypes
member.summary: Gets the which specifies the type of members dynamically accessed.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes
member.summary:
Specifies the types of members that are dynamically accessed.
This enumeration has a attribute that allows a bitwise combination of its member values.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.None
member.summary: Specifies no members.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicParameterlessConstructor
member.summary: Specifies the default, parameterless public constructor.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicConstructors
member.summary: Specifies all public constructors.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicConstructors
member.summary: Specifies all non-public constructors.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicMethods
member.summary: Specifies all public methods.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicMethods
member.summary: Specifies all non-public methods.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicFields
member.summary: Specifies all public fields.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicFields
member.summary: Specifies all non-public fields.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicNestedTypes
member.summary: Specifies all public nested types.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicNestedTypes
member.summary: Specifies all non-public nested types.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicProperties
member.summary: Specifies all public properties.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicProperties
member.summary: Specifies all non-public properties.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicEvents
member.summary: Specifies all public events.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicEvents
member.summary: Specifies all non-public events.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.Interfaces
member.summary: Specifies all interfaces implemented by the type.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.All
member.summary: Specifies all members.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute
member.summary: States a dependency that one member has on another.
member.remarks: This can be used to inform tooling of a dependency that is otherwise not evident purely from metadata and IL, for example a member relied on via reflection.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified signature of a member on the same type as the consumer.
member.param: The signature of the member depended on.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified signature of a member on a .
member.param: The signature of the member depended on.
The containing .

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified signature of a member on a type in an assembly.
member.param: The signature of the member depended on.
The full name of the type containing the specified member.
The assembly name of the type containing the specified member.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes,System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified types of members on a .
member.param: The types of members depended on.
The containing the specified members.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified types of members on a type in an assembly.
member.param: The types of members depended on.
The full name of the type containing the specified members.
The assembly name of the type containing the specified members.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.MemberSignature
member.summary: Gets the signature of the member depended on.
member.remarks: Either must be a valid string or must not equal , but not both.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.MemberTypes
member.summary: Gets the which specifies the type of members depended on.
member.remarks: Either must be a valid string or must not equal , but not both.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.Type
member.summary: Gets the containing the specified member.
member.remarks: If neither nor are specified, the type of the consumer is assumed.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.TypeName
member.summary: Gets the full name of the type containing the specified member.
member.remarks: If neither nor are specified, the type of the consumer is assumed.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.AssemblyName
member.summary: Gets the assembly name of the specified type.
member.remarks: is only valid when is specified.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicDependencyAttribute.Condition
member.summary: Gets or sets the condition in which the dependency is applicable, e.g. "DEBUG".

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not null when the call returns.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCodeAttribute
member.summary: /// Indicates that the specified method requires dynamic access to code that is not referenced statically, for example through .
member.remarks: This allows tools to understand which methods are unsafe to call when removing unreferenced code from an application.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCodeAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified message.
member.param: A message that contains information about the usage of unreferenced code.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCodeAttribute.Message
member.summary: Gets a message that contains information about the usage of unreferenced code.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCodeAttribute.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional URL that contains more information about the method, why it requires unreferenced code, and what options a consumer has to deal with it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute
member.summary: /// Suppresses reporting of a specific rule violation, allowing multiple suppressions on a single code artifact.
member.remarks: is different than in that it doesn't have a . So it is always preserved in the compiled assembly.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, specifying the category of the tool and the identifier for an analysis rule.
member.param: The category for the attribute.
The identifier of the analysis rule the attribute applies to.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Category
member.summary: Gets the category identifying the classification of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property describes the tool or tool analysis category for which a message suppression attribute applies.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.CheckId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the analysis tool rule to be suppressed.
member.remarks: Concatenated together, the and properties form a unique check identifier.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Scope
member.summary: Gets or sets the scope of the code that is relevant for the attribute.
member.remarks: The Scope property is an optional argument that specifies the metadata scope for which the attribute is relevant.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Target
member.summary: Gets or sets a fully qualified path that represents the target of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument identifying the analysis target of the attribute. An example value is "System.IO.Stream.ctor():System.Void". Because it is fully qualified, it can be long, particularly for targets such as parameters. The analysis tool user interface should be capable of automatically formatting the parameter.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.MessageId
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional argument expanding on exclusion criteria.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument that specifies additional exclusion where the literal metadata target is not sufficiently precise. For example, the cannot be applied within a method, and it may be desirable to suppress a violation against a statement in the method that will give a rule violation, but not against all statements in the method.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Justification
member.summary: Gets or sets the justification for suppressing the code analysis message.
